qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS.oi_departamento, ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS.c_departamento, ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS.d_departamento FROM ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS WHERE ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} AND ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS.oi_departamento = {#SOURCE:@id} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Departamentos.DEPARTAMENTO\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS.oi_departamento, ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS.c_departamento, ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS.d_departamento FROM ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS WHERE ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} AND ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS.c_departamento = {substring_before(#SOURCE:@CODE,\'-\')} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Departamentos.DEPARTAMENTO\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS.oi_departamento, ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS.c_departamento, ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS.d_departamento FROM ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS WHERE ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa}
')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Departamentos.DEPARTAMENTO\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW
